ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., microcontroller, sensor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the device was produced */,
  "last_configured_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last configured */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was last accessed */,
  "last_accessed_by" TEXT /* User who last accessed the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_model FOREIGN KEY ("device_model") REFERENCES device_models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_status" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration status */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the configuration belongs to */,
  "srl" INTEGER /* Status Register Lock (SRL) bit */,
  "srp" INTEGER /* Status Register Protection (SRP) bit */,
  "wp_status" TEXT /* Write Protect (/WP) pin status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration status */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the configuration status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration status was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the configuration status */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration status was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "write_protection" (
  "protect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each write protection setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the protection setting belongs to */,
  "protection_type" TEXT /* Type of write protection (e.g., Software, Hardware) */,
  "protection_description" TEXT /* Description of the write protection */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the write protection setting */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the write protection setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the write protection setting was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the write protection setting */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the write protection setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_write_protection_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_register" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status register setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the status register belongs to */,
  "srl" INTEGER /* Status Register Lock (SRL) bit */,
  "srp" INTEGER /* Status Register Protection (SRP) bit */,
  "wp_status" TEXT /* Write Protect (/WP) pin status */,
  "register_status" TEXT /* Status of the register */,
  "register_description" TEXT /* Description of the status register setting */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the status register setting */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the status register setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status register setting was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the status register setting */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the status register setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_register_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_supply" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power supply setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the power supply setting belongs to */,
  "power_status" TEXT /* Status of the power supply (e.g., Lock-Down) */,
  "power_description" TEXT /* Description of the power supply setting */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the power supply setting */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the power supply setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the power supply setting was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the power supply setting */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the power supply setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_supply_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration change */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the configuration change belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration status before the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration change */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the configuration history entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configuration_status ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, configure, test) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., Microcontroller, Sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device type (e.g., industrial, automotive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the device type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the device type was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the device type */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the device type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the manufacturer entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer entry was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the manufacturer entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the device model */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device model (e.g., industrial, automotive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the device model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the device model was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the device model */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the device model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_models_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "srl" INTEGER /* Status Register Lock (SRL) bit */,
  "srp" INTEGER /* Status Register Protection (SRP) bit */,
  "wp_status" TEXT /* Write Protect (/WP) pin status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration template */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration template (e.g., industrial, automotive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the configuration template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration template was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the configuration template */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration template was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_templates" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-template association */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration template */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date the template was applied to the device */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device-template association (e.g., industrial, automotive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the device-template association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the device-template association was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the device-template association */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the device-template association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_templates_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES configuration_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_templates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
